key_factors: The smaller power is under extreme duress with 28.1% of territory already lost in only seven days, indicating a rapid rate of collapse in territorial integrity. The military balance is severely skewed against the defender (-0.04), suggesting the aggressor possesses overwhelming conventional superiority. While the defender has successfully held "key positions" this period and increased international support to 55.9%, the sheer scale of territorial loss and the 10/10 crisis level create a high risk of institutional failure or a forced negotiated transition. The presence of discussions regarding "territorial concessions" indicates the government is already contemplating the loss of sovereign control.
